## FAST variable

The FAST messaging API for warnings and errors.

**Signature:**

```typescript
FAST: {
    warn(_code: number, _values?: Record<string, any>): void;
    error(code: number, _values?: Record<string, any>): Error;
    addMessages(messages: Record<number, string>): void;
}
```
